title: geranium rigidum
intro: Geranium rigidum, also known as the stiff-leaved geranium, is a perennial herb belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing fluid retention and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and gout. The health benefits of Geranium rigidum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Geranium rigidum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
